title: Indian Refiners' January Crude Processing Fell In January
summary: Indian refiners' crude processing (throughput) fell by 0.2% month-on-month in January 2026, reaching 5.63 million barrels per day (bpd) or 23.81 million metric tons, marking a slight decrease after December throughput clocked in at 5.64 million bpd. title: Half A Million Without Power After Winter Storm Ravages US Northeast
